output.final_deliverable:
1. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page -> 2. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents -> 3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Outline_of_culture -> 4. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Art -> 5. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Painting

Verified adjacency (evidence that one page links to the next):
- From URL[2] to URL[3]: The Portal:Contents page (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents) contains a link to the "Outline of culture" page (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Outline_of_culture). Evidence: the Portal:Contents page includes the text and link to "Outline of culture" (see: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents).

Notes on how the chain was built (order shown):
1. Start: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page
2. Follow link on Main Page to: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents
3. From Portal:Contents follow link to: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Outline_of_culture
4. From Outline of culture follow link to: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Art
5. From Art follow link to: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Painting

Summary: Built a chain of 5 Wikipedia URLs starting at the Main Page where each subsequent URL is linked from the previous page. Verified adjacency explicitly for the pair Portal:Contents -> Outline of culture by showing that the Portal:Contents page contains a link to the Outline of culture page (URL[2] links to URL[3]).
output.action_summary: Chain of 5 Wikipedia URLs starting from Main Page; verified that https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents links to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Outline_of_culture (evidence shown).
